name: Chicken Oscar
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken between 2 pieces of wax paper on a cutting board and pound very thin.
2. Combine flour, salt, and pepper in a shallow bowl.
3. Heat butter in a heavy skillet.
4. Dip chicken pieces lightly in the seasoned flour and shake off excess.
5. When butter stops foaming, add chicken and cook 3 to 4 minutes per side until golden.
6. Remove to a heated serving platter as remaining pieces are cooked.
7. Cover each slice of chicken with crabmeat and top with 3 asparagus spears.
8. Drizzle hollandaise sauce over asparagus and serve.
